product.name: Ovaltine 3 in 1 Instant Malt Drink Sachets - Chocolate

product.description: No artificial colouring, flavours, sweeteners or preservatives

metaData.Ingredients:
Cereal Extract (Barley, Malted Barley, Millet, Wheat), Sugar, Maltodextrin Powder, Skimmed Milk Powder (10%), Non-Dairy Creamer {Glucose Syrup Solids, Vegetable Fat (Palm Fat), Stabilizer [Ins 340(Ii), Ins451(I), Milk Protein(Casein), Emulsifier (Ins471, Ins472 E), Anticaking Agent (Ins551)}, Cocoa Powder, Minerals (Calcium Carbonate, Ferric Pyrophosphate, Sodium Chloride, Zinc Sulphate), Thickener (Ins415), Flavouring Substances, Dextrose Anhydrous, Vitamins (C, B3, B2, B6, E, B1, A, Folic Acid, B12)

Milk Products From Cows and Buffaloes Milk. Contains Permitted Colouring and Flavouring Substances. All Food Additives Are Of Plant and Synthetic Origin. Contains Cereal with Gluten, Milk and Milk Products and Soy. Suitable For Vegetarians Who Consume Dairy Products
metaData.Key Information:
Horlicks is made from the natural goodness of malted barley, wheat and milk with no artificial colouring, flavours, sweeteners or preservatives

The great family nourisher! With 14 vital nutrients supporting 5 advantages made with goodness of wheat, malt and milk:
• Strong body
• Strong bones
• Energy release
• Muscle function
• Good vision
metaData.Preparation:
For great natural taste:
1. Add 6 teaspoons of Horlicks Chocolate (25g) in a cup
2. Add 200ml hot water and stir

For milkier taste:
Add two teaspoons of skimmed milk or milk powder or fresh milk to the freshly made hot Horlicks

Also delicious when cold:
1. In a tall glass, add 6 teaspoons of Horlicks Chocolate (25g)
2. Then add enough hot water to make a paste
3. Stir, and top up with cold water
4. Add ice as required
metaData.Storage Information:
• Store at room temperature below 30°C
• Once opened, please use contents within 1 month of opening to maintain freshness

metaData.Key Information:
New and unique indulgent experience through KIT KAT Hot Chocolate beverage.
• Your favourite break now in a hot chocolate!
• Smooth, creamy and velvety
• Delicious balance of wafery and cocoa notes
• Perfect cup to lift your mood anytime, anywhere!
• Enjoying in a cup of warm, smooth chocolatey goodness with signature KIT KAT taste.
• Encouraging consumers take a moment to relax and come back refreshed, uplifted and with a positive perspective anytime of the day.

offers.description: Buy 1 Kit Kat 3 In 1 Chocolate Drink @ $6.75

metaData.Ingredients: Sugar, Wheat Flour, Dried Skimmed Milk, Malted Barley, Dried Whey, Calcium Carbonate, Glucose, Vegetable Fat, Salt, Acidity Regulator (Potassium Bicarbonate), Milk Proteins, Vitamins (C, Niacin, E, Pantothenic Acid, B6, B2, B1, Folic Acid, A, Biotin, D, B12), Emulsifiers (Sodium Triphosphate, Mono- and di-glycerides of fatty acids, Sodium Stearoyl Lactylate), Stabiliser (Dipotassium Phosphate), Ferric Pyrophosphate, Anti-caking agent (Sodium Silicoaluminate), Zinc Oxide, Colour (Riboflavin)
metaData.Key Information: Horlicks is made from the natural goodness of malted barley, wheat and milk with no artificial colouring, flavours, sweeteners or preservatives. Contains NutriFill-Max, a unique combination of carefully selected Vitamins and Minerals such as vitamins A, B1, B2, B3, C, D and E, calcium, iron, folic acid and more. These important nutrients help provide nourishment to support growth on a daily basis and is specially formulated by GlaxoSmithKline combining scientific knowledge and years of experience, keeping you and your family nourished everyday.

metaData.Preparation:
• For great natural taste:
1. Put at least three heaped teaspoonfuls of Horlicks (30g) in a cup
2. Add 170ml hot water and stir
• For milkier taste:
If you want a milkier taste, add two teaspoons of skimmed milk or milk powder or fresh milk to the freshly made hot Horlicks
• Also delicious when cold:
1. In a tall glass, add 3 heaped teaspoonfuls of Horlicks (30g)
2. Then add enough hot water to make a paste
3. Stir, and top up with cold water
4. Add ice as required
